content.en:
Ye Tian couldn't figure it out for the time being, so he didn't want to.

It's a good thing that the six super-name-level forces don't make a move against the human race.

Although he was not afraid of those supreme-level existences that had now entered the Dark Forbidden Domain, the six super-name-level forces had invincible-level existences after all, and if he killed too many supreme-level existences of the six major forces, then the invincible-level existence would inevitably descend on the Dark Forbidden Domain.

In that case, even if he could escape, the Terrans wouldn't be able to escape.

Therefore, he doesn't really want to provoke the six super-famous forces at the moment.

As time passed, the first Origin Rule Heist Crystal of the Dark Forbidden Realm appeared.

The Dark Forbidden Domain is the base camp of the human race, Ye Tian is extremely familiar with the Dark Forbidden Domain, plus his strength is very strong, so he can rush to the destination in time to snatch the Origin Rule Robbery Crystal.

Although the first Origin Rule Robbery Crystal was not snatched by Ye Tian, the second Origin Rule Robbery Crystal was snatched by Ye Tian.

Unconsciously, the Dark Forbidden Domain had already given birth to more than twenty Origin Rule Tribulation Crystals, and Ye Tian had snatched six Origin Rule Tribulation Crystals, which was definitely a very large number.

During this period, Ye Tian also encountered the supreme-level powerhouses of the six super-name-level forces, and they also snatched some Origin Rule Robbery Crystals, but because they were mainly looking for something, most of the people did not participate in the snatching of Origin Rule Robbery Crystals, so the six major forces did not snatch many Origin Rule Robbery Crystals.

Now, except for the Terrans and the Battle Gate, the other forces in the Dark Forbidden Domain have almost all been wiped out, and only a few ancestors are left in hiding and still alive.

The dark holy places have long since been destroyed, and the entire dark forbidden realm has become extremely empty.

this day.

Somewhere in the Dark Forbidden Domain, a supreme-level exotic powerhouse was exploring this area, and suddenly sensed a special space-time node.

"There must be a hidden ancestor of the Dark Forbidden Realm here, right?"

The exotic powerhouse thought to himself.

So, he attacked the space-time node.

Click!!

This piece of time and space directly shattered, and a figure was revealed, which was a top ancestor.

If Ye Tian was here, he would definitely recognize the identity of this ancestor, who was the master of the Holy Ancestor, the Ancestor of the Hundred Spirits.

At this time, the Hundred Spirits Ancestor looked desperate.

This place is very hidden, there are no resources and treasures in the nearby area, and it just so happens that there is a hidden space-time node here, if it is hidden, as long as there is no ancestor in the nearby area, it is difficult to detect this space-time node.

And the Dark Forbidden Realm was so huge that even the Supreme Ancestor couldn't explore much of the area, so he still had a good chance of avoiding this catastrophe again.

Unexpectedly, he was unlucky this time and was discovered.

"Hahahaha, a top ancestor, kill you, I can get the resources on you, you top ancestors are very rich, killing one of you is more profitable than slaughtering a territory!"

The foreign powerhouse said excitedly.

The ancestor of Bailu did not want to die, as an ancient ancestor, he lived for a long time, had a lot of hole cards, and also had a glimmer of hope to escape.

Immediately, he offered a bead.

This bead is an innate ancestor that he once accidentally discovered, which can cause time and space shocks, as well as isolate a piece of time and space, and fight for his hope of escaping.

Airplanes!!!!

The bead was sacrificed, and this piece of time and space vibrated and separated himself from the foreign powerhouse.

Then, he began to run away.

However, the unexpected arose.

The space-time shock caused the resonance of a special space-time, and a wisp of terrifying aura was transmitted from the unknown space-time.

This wisp of breath not only made the Hundred Spirits Ancestor cold, but even the supreme powerhouse of the Exotic Land trembled.

"What is this ......?"

He felt death, and the owner of that breath was far more than he could have imagined.

Click!

Time and space shattered, a claw poked out from the depths of time and space, and the Ancestor of the Hundred Spirits bore the brunt and was directly killed in seconds.

The exotic powerhouse wanted to escape, but was stared at by a pair of pupils, as if he was directly imprisoned.

Then, with a claw grasping him, a slight pinch of the powerhouse turned to ashes.

......

"There it is!"

A man with three eyes and golden wings on his back was holding a compass with the compass pointer pointing to where the claw had appeared.

This man is the Phantom Ancestor of the Illusory Dream Realm, one of the six super-name-level forces, proficient in illusion, his name is Ziling Phantom Ancestor, the third level of the Supreme Phantom Ancestor.

Wow!

The man broke through time and space and traveled past.

At the same time, one Phantom Ancestor after another in the Illusory Dream Realm traveled through time and space, descending on the place where the Hundred Spirits Ancestor fell.

In addition, the other five major forces also noticed it and descended here one after another.

The powerhouses of the six super-famous forces were so tacitly that they didn't make a move, and after looking at each other, they decided to cooperate.

"Cooperate, the Tribulation Beast is very powerful, even if it is only a Tribulation Beast, it is comparable to the weakest invincible-level existence, we must unite to be sure to kill each other. "

"Okay, then cooperate, and then choose to distribute the benefits when you kill the beast!"

"No problem!"

"We agree!"

After the six super-name forces chose to cooperate, they joined forces to attack the unknown time and space.

Bang!!!!

The unknown space-time barrier was torn apart, and the eyes of many powerful people saw a huge figure.

It was an unimaginably large and terrifying beast, with infinite rules permeating all around, and the aura on its body crushed the strongest ancestor.

It can be said that any supreme-level existence facing this beast may be killed in an instant.

As a result, the supreme-level beings of one force after another immediately cast battle arrays, and six battle formations surrounded this tribulation beast.

The fight has begun!

As soon as they fought, they realized that they had underestimated the strength of this beast.

"It's not good, this robber beast is a relatively powerful one in the first tribulation beast, we can't kill him, we have to ask for help!"

A supreme powerhouse thought to himself.

There's no way to ask for support, and they don't want to ask for support.

Because once you ask for support, it means that you will get less benefits.

After all, even if it is the same force, it does not want to share the benefits with others, and if they have a way to solve it, no one will want to call others.

But now, it's no longer possible not to call people, otherwise not only will you not be able to kill the beasts, but you will lose manpower.

Soon, the battle spread far, far away, coupled with Ye Tian's thought incarnation looking for the Origin Rule Robbery Crystal in the Dark Forbidden Domain, one of the thought incarnations sensed the fluctuation of the battle, so he noticed it.

So, Ye Tianzhen shuttled over and saw that the powerhouses of the six major forces were besieging the robbery beast.

The moment he saw the beast, Ye Tian was also shocked.

The rules emanating from this robber beast turned out to be the rules of the Dark Forbidden Domain, obviously a creature of the Dark Forbidden Domain, but the Dark Forbidden Domain actually had such a terrifying creature.

"What the hell is this creature?"

Ye Tian was full of curiosity.

But he guessed that the real target of the six super-name-level forces was probably this creature.
